gt_sql: SELECT T1.`First Date` FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.LDH >= 500 ORDER BY T1.`First Date` DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p."First Date"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.LDH >= 500
ORDER BY p."First Date" DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: When is the latest patient's medical data recorded? This patient should have an abnormal level of lactate dehydrogenase.
